item.title: Return of the Meme: 1707 (cucumber)
item.description:
You know, I really try to check that what I post isn't AI except with wizard posting (as AI is obviously deep dark evil magic), but occasionally I miss one or two. I am not perfect, but I am trying. If you think you're so perfect, post your own perfection dumps. I am trying to do my best to fucking brighten up the room in a dying hellscape from which nobody wants to do the effort to escape, okay? Let's get this fucking bread.
I wasn't ever really hot, but on the other hand, I have always had the interest in birds since I was 8. I also don't think I will ever be hot. I'm not exactly attractive to anyone.
Could be a fun time.
No queens, no lords, we will not be fooled again. Death to all nobility.
Missing: hummingbirds.
I have lost so many wars against myself. My soul and brain has so many scars from them.
Negative, Valued Customer, you cannot rest.
Also death to the manosphere.
Actually a quote from Jesus, but I laughed at the assumption that because it's woke, it's Marx.
If he does, I'll soon be without a job probably
I hope that's a knife in her hand and she's going to sacrifice me, I dont particularly want to live.
We are supposed to suffer better as men because that is what we were created to do, apparently. [Sarcasm]
That's a valid reason.
Yeah, sorry kid, if there are historians in the future that's exactly how they will refer to this fucking shitshow.
Fighting sauropods, can't remember what species.
Hudsonian Whimbrel, I think
I've wanted to die since I was 9.
Ugh.
Did you know that roadrunners are a species of Cuckoo?
Love that people are out there calling birds like Pippin "Pope-cuckoos"
We tried to rescue a pigeon the other day that looked like it had string on it's foot but we couldn't.
I think technically kings were voted on in Wessex, the HRE, and the Mexíca. But i may be misremembering.
Lucky for them.
That's impressive, Olive-sided Warblers only want three, usually.
This never works for me.
No, the fucker is still awake.
That is kinda wild.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "peek a boo! What doin?" ____ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: The artists behind the memes
item.description:
Yesterday I made a post on Bluesky ( https://bsky.app/profile/aimeecozza.com/post/3mnfidv7fkk2y ) asking people to please remember the artists who often go uncredited when it comes to memes and inviting people to post the meme artworks with artist credits. A lot of the times their artworks are just ripped from the internet, and even worse, plenty of times artists have their signatures cropped off of obfuscated by emojis, other watermarks, or scribbles! Everything on the internet didn't just come out of nothing, despite what some people might think, so I thought I'd make an Imgur companion post to go with that shows which artists have done what popular memes... Starting with KC Green and the This is Fine dog. https://kcgreendotcom.com/
I GUESS is ALSO made by KC Green. The full comic sure is something https://gunshowcomic.com/367
Galan Pang: https://www.artstation.com/artwork/WXKaE
Diana Franco: https://dianafranco.artstation.com/projects/3mgAE
Jana Heidersdorf: https://janaheidersdorf.com/
Tristan Elwell: https://tristanelwell.com/
JobeeArt: https://bsky.app/profile/jobeeart.bsky.social
Ward Sutton: https://www.instagram.com/wardsutton/
Anya Boz: https://www.anyaboz.com/room-guardian-gallery
Norman Rockwell: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Norman_Rockwell
Anelien/cupcakelogic: https://www.instagram.com/cupcake.logic/
Hannah Hillam: https://www.instagram.com/hannahhillam
Yuko Ota from a guest strip in Questionable Content, written by Ananth Hirsh
Kate Beaton: http://www.harkavagrant.com/index.php?id=213
@nauciflocci: https://www.instagram.com/nauciflocci
CassWArt: https://www.casswomack.com/
False Knees: https://store.falseknees.com/
Angus McBride: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Angus_McBride
Qinni: https://www.instagram.com/qinniart/
Destiny Blue: https://www.deviantart.com/destinyblue/art/Depression-534485738
Lycanium: https://www.deviantart.com/lycanium/art/Loss-468754170
item.dc:creator: the9mm

item.title: GovBrief Today #489
item.description: Marco Rubio told Congress this week the war with Iran is over. The next day, Iranian drones tore through a terminal at Kuwait's main airport that had reopened only two days before, killing one person and wounding more than sixty. The House voted that same day to demand Trump end a war his own administration says is already finished. Trump has privately told aides he would restart the war if Iran kills American troops, according to Wall Street Journal reporting. A war that is over does not need a condition for restarting. Trump has set one anyway. I've emailed 7,673 stories over 489 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address the website and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260603-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-greenland [2] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june3 [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ny-redistricting [4] https://go.govbrief.today/boutros-grandjury [5] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-500 [6] https://go.govbrief.today/blanche-ag [7] https://go.govbrief.today/abregogarcia-mullin [8] https://go.govbrief.today/louisiana-winn [9] https://go.govbrief.today/sherill-delaney [10] https://go.govbrief.today/church-protesters [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-dms [12] https://go.govbrief.today/ballroom-billion [13] https://go.govbrief.today/schedulef [14] https://go.govbrief.today/vulcan-congress [15] https://go.govbrief.today/nobid-statues [16] https://go.govbrief.today/war-powers-house Epstein Timeline: https://go.govbrief.today/epstein-crimes Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: For new I came close with the old sandy hook conspiracy videos. They were creative edited to hide their blatant lying. Someone pointed it out to me early. Thankfully I can bite recognize the tricks they use.
